title: Cades Website
text:
My Bio:
Hello all, my name is Cade Hamil and I grew up in Paris, Tx on a Cow-Calf/Stocker operation. I did my undergraduate degree at East Texas A&M majoring in Animal Science and upon completion of that degree I decided to continue my education at Oklahoma State University studying Nutrition under Dr. Paul Beck. My research will be looking at differing roughage levels in feedlot diets.
Research Interest:
I am fascinated by all facets of the Beef Cattle Industry, so I would be proud to work on any research oppertunity in any of the sectors.

Feedlot cattle

Growth and Overall Performance
Methane Production as a measure of efficiency
Carcass Charactertistics

Stocker Cattle

Wheat Pasture Research
Techniques to improve growth

Cow-Calf

Calf Immunity
Mother’s immune system heritablitly
